name: Americano
garnish: Half orange slice and a lemon twist
method: Pour Campari and sweet vermouth directly into a highball glass filled with ice, top up with soda water, stir gently, garnish.

name: Angel Face
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Aviation
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Bacardi Cocktail
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Between the Sheets
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Boulevardier
method: Stir all ingredients with ice in a mixing glass and strain into an old fashioned glass over ice.

name: Brandy Crusta
garnish: Lemon peel spiral lining the glass, sugar rim
method: Rim a chilled cocktail glass with lemon and sugar, line with a spiral of lemon peel. Shake remaining ingredients with ice and strain into the glass.

name: Casino
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Clover Club
method: Dry shake all ingredients, then shake again with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Daiquiri
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Dry Martini
method: Stir ingredients with ice in a mixing glass and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Gin Fizz
method: Shake gin, lemon juice and sugar syrup with ice, strain into a highball glass with ice cubes, top with soda water.

name: Hanky Panky
method: Stir all ingredients with ice in a mixing glass and strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with orange peel.

name: Manhattan
method: Stir all ingredients with ice in a mixing glass and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Mary Pickford
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Monkey Gland
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Negroni
method: Build all ingredients into an old fashioned glass filled with ice. Stir gently. Garnish.

name: Old Fashioned
method: Muddle the sugar cube with bitters and a splash of soda water in the glass. Add ice and whiskey, stir, garnish.

name: Paradise
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Planter's Punch
garnish: Orange slice, pineapple wedge and cocktail cherry
method: Shake rum, lime juice, sugar syrup and bitters with ice, strain into an ice-filled highball glass, top with soda water.

name: Porto Flip
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Grate nutmeg on top.

name: Ramos Fizz
method: Shake all ingredients except soda vigorously without ice, then again with ice. Strain into a highball glass and top with soda water.

name: Rusty Nail
method: Build ingredients into an old fashioned glass filled with ice and stir gently.

name: Sazerac
method: Rinse a chilled old fashioned glass with absinthe and discard excess. Muddle sugar cube with bitters, add whiskey and ice, stir, strain into the prepared glass. Garnish with lemon peel.

name: Sidecar
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Stinger
method: Shake ingredients with ice and strain into an old fashioned glass filled with crushed ice.

name: Tom Collins
method: Shake gin, lemon juice and sugar syrup with ice, strain into a collins glass filled with ice, top with soda water.

name: Whiskey Sour
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into an old fashioned glass over ice.

name: White Lady
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Champagne Cocktail
method: Saturate the sugar cube with bitters and place in the flute, top with champagne. Garnish.

name: Alaska
method: Stir all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Alexander
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: B-52
method: Layer ingredients in order in a shot glass, pouring gently over the back of a bar spoon.

name: Bellini
method: Pour peach puree into a chilled flute and top with prosecco. Stir gently.

name: Black Russian
method: Build ingredients into an old fashioned glass filled with ice and stir gently.

name: Bloody Mary
method: Build all ingredients into a highball glass filled with ice, roll gently to mix, garnish.

name: Blue Lagoon
method: Build vodka and blue curacao into an ice-filled highball glass, top with lemonade, stir gently, garnish.

name: Caipirinha
ingredients: Half a Lime, cut into wedges
method: Muddle lime wedges with sugar in the glass, fill with crushed ice, add cachaca and stir.

name: Corpse Reviver #2
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass rinsed with absinthe.

name: Cosmopolitan
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Cuba Libre
method: Build rum and lime juice into an ice-filled highball glass, top with cola, stir gently, garnish.

name: French 75
method: Shake gin, lemon juice and sugar syrup with ice, strain into a flute, top with champagne.

name: French Connection
method: Build ingredients into an old fashioned glass filled with ice and stir gently.

name: Golden Dream
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Grasshopper
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Horse's Neck
method: Place a long spiral of lemon peel in the glass with ice, add brandy, top with ginger ale, stir gently.

name: Irish Coffee
method: Dissolve sugar in hot coffee, add whiskey, stir, and carefully float cream on top over the back of a spoon.

name: Kir
method: Pour creme de cassis into the glass and top up with chilled white wine.

name: Kir Royal
method: Pour creme de cassis into a flute and top with champagne.

name: Long Island Iced Tea
method: Shake all ingredients except cola with ice, strain into an ice-filled highball glass, top with a splash of cola.

name: Mai Tai
method: Shake all ingredients with crushed ice and pour unstrained into an old fashioned glass. Garnish.

name: Margarita
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled, salt-rimmed cocktail glass.

name: Mimosa
method: Pour chilled orange juice into a flute and top with champagne. Stir gently.

name: Mojito
method: Muddle mint leaves gently with sugar and lime juice. Add rum, fill with crushed ice, top with soda water, stir. Garnish.

name: Moscow Mule
method: Build vodka and lime juice into an ice-filled mug, top with ginger beer, stir gently, garnish.

name: Piña Colada
method: Blend or shake all ingredients with crushed ice and pour into a glass.

name: Sea Breeze
method: Build all ingredients into an ice-filled highball glass and stir gently.

name: Sex on the Beach
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into an ice-filled highball glass.

name: Screwdriver
method: Build vodka into an ice-filled highball glass, top with orange juice, stir gently.

name: Tequila Sunrise
method: Build tequila and orange juice into an ice-filled highball glass, slowly pour grenadine so it settles, do not stir.

name: Vesper
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: White Russian
method: Build vodka and coffee liqueur into an ice-filled old fashioned glass, float cream on top.

name: Zombie
method: Shake all ingredients with crushed ice and pour into a glass.

name: Tuxedo
method: Stir all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Bramble
method: Shake gin, lemon juice and sugar syrup with ice, pour into an ice-filled old fashioned glass, drizzle creme de mure over the top. Garnish.

name: Espresso Martini
method: Shake all ingredients vigorously with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: French Martini
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Kamikaze
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Lemon Drop Martini
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled, sugar-rimmed cocktail glass.

name: Pisco Sour
method: Dry shake all ingredients, then shake again with ice, strain into a glass, garnish with bitters drops on the foam.

name: Porn Star Martini
method: Shake all ingredients except prosecco with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Serve with a side shot of chilled prosecco.

name: Tommy's Margarita
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into an ice-filled old fashioned glass.

name: Yellow Bird
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Jasmine
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Naked and Famous
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Paloma
method: Build tequila and lime juice into a salt-rimmed, ice-filled highball glass, top with grapefruit soda, stir gently.

name: Penicillin
method: Shake whisky, lemon juice and honey-ginger syrup with ice, strain into an ice-filled old fashioned glass, float the Islay malt on top.

name: Spicy Fifty
method: Muddle chili in the shaker, add remaining ingredients with ice, shake well and double strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Suffering Bastard
method: Shake gin, cognac, lime juice and bitters with ice, strain into an ice-filled highball glass, top with ginger ale.

name: Old Cuban
method: Shake rum, lime juice, sugar syrup, mint and bitters with ice, double strain into a chilled coupe, top with champagne.

name: Dark 'n' Stormy
method: Build lime juice into an ice-filled highball glass, top with ginger beer, float dark rum on top.

name: Bee's Knees
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Russian Spring Punch
method: Shake vodka, creme de cassis, lemon juice and sugar syrup with ice, strain into an ice-filled highball glass, top with champagne.

name: 20th Century
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Jungle Bird
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into an ice-filled old fashioned glass.

name: Barracuda
method: Shake rum, galliano, pineapple juice and lime juice with ice, strain into a glass, top with sparkling wine.

name: Aperol Spritz
method: Build ingredients over ice in a wine glass in order, stir gently and garnish.

name: Gin Basil Smash
method: Muddle basil leaves with sugar syrup and lemon juice, add gin and ice, shake vigorously and double strain into an ice-filled old fashioned glass.

name: Kingston Negroni
method: Stir all ingredients with ice in a mixing glass and strain into an ice-filled old fashioned glass. Garnish.
